message.content:
@startuml
participant A as "A"
participant CircuitBreaker as "CircuitBreaker"
participant B as "B"

participant A
participant CircuitBreaker
participant B

alt [no errors]
    A -> CircuitBreaker: call()
    CircuitBreaker -> B: call()
    B -> CircuitBreaker: response
    CircuitBreaker -> A: response
end

alt [errors]
    A -> CircuitBreaker: call()
    loop [while err_count < max_errors]
        CircuitBreaker -> A: call()
        A -> CircuitBreaker: error
        CircuitBreaker -> CircuitBreaker: err_count++
        CircuitBreaker -> CircuitBreaker: sleep(timeout)
        CircuitBreaker -> A: call()
        A -> CircuitBreaker: error
        CircuitBreaker -> CircuitBreaker: sleep(timeout*2)
    end
end

@enduml
